## Description

<!-- Briefly describe what you're adding or changing and why -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] New site addition
- [ ] Update to existing entry (description, link, category)
- [ ] Infrastructure or documentation improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] The site is **live and accessible**
- [ ] The site requires **no subscription or paywall**
- [ ] The site features **interactive timelines, sliders, overlays, or era-specific interfaces**
- [ ] The site is designed for **serendipitous browsing/exploration** (not direct search)
- [ ] I have verified the URL works and the description is accurate
- [ ] I have followed the existing format: `- [Site Name](URL) 🎬🎵 - Description`
- [ ] I have placed the entry in the correct category
